calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Modifying Trust Terms Under Probate Code Section 15043
Off Calendar Apr-13-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stacey Nelson for and with Richard Hodgkinson, Individually
Thomas D'Amato for and with John Hodgkinson, Jeff Hodgkinson, and for Lindsey Hodgkinson and Laura Hodgkinson (Adult Beneficiaries)
Bart Flood for and with Richard Hodgkinson and John Hodgkinson (Trustees)

Mr. Flood stated that he prepared this petition, is the attorney for the family, there was a dispute between the beneficiaries and the trustees, and each has individual Counsel. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to modifying the original Trust, the validity of the new Trust instrument executed days before Ms. Nancy Hodgkinson's passing, the efficiency of achieving same results of settlement agreement, bringing harmony to the family, assets are in the original trust, to avoid Probate and filing a Heggstad petition. Ms. Nelson stated that the revocation and new Trust were executed together, that they were able to settle without a lawsuit, the dispute was between the revocation and the new trust, citing undue influence, a mistake, or lack of capacity. The Court stated that this is unusual, that it all hinges on undue influence and you don't revise something that has been revoked. The Court asked what is the evidence and is struggling with the way this is done. Mr. D'Amato stated that the intent was to protect the rights of the children, the operative function are the modifications and the Dad and children are in agreement to this. The Petition for order modifying trust terms is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Leslie Gomez. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
